title: Plugin Management UI — browser, installer, config panel for desktop Electron/SolidJS plugins
boundary: Plugin Management UI — browser, installer, config panel for desktop Electron/SolidJS plugins
consumer_purpose: Allow desktop users to browse installed plugins, install new ones (npm/file path), enable/disable, and configure per-plugin settings.
claim_atoms: User can browse all installed plugins in a dialog (name, path, enabled status)
User can install plugin via npm specifier or file path
User can enable/disable plugins with a toggle
Each plugin can store/retrieve per-plugin config via dedicated store
IPC handlers follow electron-store dedicated channel pattern
The dangling get-desktop-plugin-config channel is implemented
validateAndFilterPluginConfigs returns { configs, dropped } so renderer can surface data-loss warnings
plugin-loader.ts catches IPC rejection via .catch(() => []) — no unhandled promise rejection
isValidPluginConfigEntry and validateAndFilterPluginConfigs have automated bun tests

    {
      "id": "RC-1",
      "hypothesis": "ipcMain.handle('get-desktop-plugin-config') was removed or never added to main/ipc.ts after the preload bridge and type declaration were created. The renderer calls it but it resolves to undefined at runtime, silently breaking all plugin loading.",
      "confidence": "high",
      "evidence": [
        "preload/index.ts:84 wires getDesktopPluginConfig -> ipcRenderer.invoke('get-desktop-plugin-config')",
        "preload/types.ts:108 declares getDesktopPluginConfig?: () => Promise<any>",
        "plugin-loader.ts:39 calls window.api.getDesktopPluginConfig?.() and casts result as PluginConfigEntry[]",
        "main/ipc.ts:20 RESERVED_STORE_NAMES has only ['desktop-custom-agents', 'desktop-mcp-servers'] — no 'desktop-plugin-config'",
        "main/ipc.ts:270-277 shows get-desktop-mcp-servers/set-desktop-mcp-servers pattern but NO equivalent for plugin config",
        "Edit history shows get-desktop-plugin-config was added then removed from main/ipc.ts"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "RC-2",
      "hypothesis": "PluginKind union at shared.ts:37 was not updated to include 'desktop' when the DesktopPluginModule was created, leaving desktop plugins invisible to the opencode plugin type system.",
      "confidence": "high",
      "evidence": [
        "shared.ts:37 defines export type PluginKind = \"server\" | \"tui\" without desktop",
        "packages/plugin/src/desktop.ts exports DesktopPluginModule with desktop() entrypoint but no type-level connection to PluginKind",
        "Edit history shows \"Add desktop to PluginKind union\" in a prior session but the change did not persist to current HEAD"
      ]
    },
    {

      "hypothesis": "DesktopPluginProvider was never wired into the renderer entry point (index.tsx). The plugin-context.tsx and plugin-loader.ts exist as untracked files but the render tree does not include the provider wrapper.",

        "render tree in index.tsx does NOT have DesktopPluginProvider wrapper",
        "smart_grep for DesktopPlugin in index.tsx returns 0 matches"
      ]

      ]

  "fixes": [
    {
      "id": "fix-A",
      "description": "Add ipcMain.handle('get-desktop-plugin-config') and 'set-desktop-plugin-config' to main/ipc.ts with structured validation returning { configs, dropped }, add 'desktop-plugin-config' to RESERVED_STORE_NAMES",
      "files": ["packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts"],
      "before": "const RESERVED_STORE_NAMES = [\"desktop-custom-agents\", \"desktop-mcp-servers\"]\n\n// After MCP handlers, NO plugin config handlers exist",
      "after": "const RESERVED_STORE_NAMES = [\"desktop-custom-agents\", \"desktop-mcp-servers\", \"desktop-plugin-config\"]\n\n// Add validation helper for PluginConfigEntry shape\nfunction isValidPluginConfigEntry(val: unknown): val is Record<string, unknown> {\n  if (typeof val !== \"object\" || val === null) return false\n  const obj = val as Record<string, unknown>\n  return typeof obj.name === \"string\" && typeof obj.path === \"string\" && typeof obj.enabled === \"boolean\"\n}\n\nfunction validateAndFilterPluginConfigs(raw: unknown): { configs: unknown[]; dropped: number } {\n  if (!Array.isArray(raw)) return { configs: [], dropped: 0 }\n  const original = raw.length\n  const configs = raw.filter((item): item is Record<string, unknown> => {\n    if (isValidPluginConfigEntry(item)) return true\n    console.warn(\"Dropping invalid plugin config entry:\", item)\n    return false\n  })\n  return { configs, dropped: original - configs.length }\n}\n\n// After MCP handlers, add plugin config handlers:\nipcMain.handle(\"get-desktop-plugin-config\", () => {\n  const store = getStore(\"desktop-plugin-config\")\n  return validateAndFilterPluginConfigs(store.get(\"configs\"))\n})\nipcMain.handle(\"set-desktop-plugin-config\", (_event: IpcMainInvokeEvent, configs: unknown[]) => {\n  const store = getStore(\"desktop-plugin-config\")\n  const result = validateAndFilterPluginConfigs(configs)\n  store.set(\"configs\", result.configs)\n  return result\n})",
      "impact": {

      ],

extracted\n\ndescribe(\"isValidPluginConfigEntry\", () => {\n  it(\"returns true for valid entry with name, path, enabled\", () => {\n    expect(isValidPluginConfigEntry({ name: \"p\", path: \"/p\", enabled: true })).toBe(true)\n  })\n  it(\"returns true for entry with optional config\", () => {\n    expect(isValidPluginConfigEntry({ name: \"p\", path: \"/p\", enabled: true, config: { key: \"val\" } })).toBe(true)\n  })\n  it(\"returns false for null\", () => {\n    expect(isValidPluginConfigEntry(null)).toBe(false)\n  })\n  it(\"returns false for non-object\", () => {\n    expect(isValidPluginConfigEntry(\"string\")).toBe(false)\n  })\n  it(\"returns false for missing name\", () => {\n    expect(isValidPluginConfigEntry({ path: \"/p\", enabled: true })).toBe(false)\n  })\n  it(\"returns false for missing path\", () => {\n    expect(isValidPluginConfigEntry({ name: \"p\", enabled: true })).toBe(false)\n  })\n  it(\"returns false for non-boolean enabled\", () => {\n 123, path: \"/p\", enabled: true })).toBe(false)\n  })\n})\n\ndescribe(\"validateAndFilterPluginConfigs\", () => {\n  it(\"returns { configs: [], dropped: 0 } for non-array input\", () => {\n    const result = validateAndFilterPluginConfigs(null)\n    expect(result).toEqual({ configs: [], dropped: 0 })\n  })\n  it(\"returns { configs: [], dropped: 0 } for empty array\", () => {\n    const result = validateAndFilterPluginConfigs([])\n    expect(result).toEqual({ configs: [], dropped: 0 })\n  })\n  it(\"filters out invalid entries and reports dropped count\", () => {\n    const valid = { name: \"p\", path: \"/p\", enabled: true }\n    const invalid = { name: \"bad\" } // missing path and enabled\n    const result = validateAndFilterPluginConfigs([valid, invalid, valid])\n
